title: cotula prostrata
intro: Cotula prostrata, also known as creeping cotula, is a low-growing, spreading herb native to Australia and New Zealand, characterized by its small yellow flowers and leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cotula prostrata include its potential to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
